_comment: Copy this file to custom_prompts.json to override benchmark prompts.
_comment2: Only include the keys you want to change — the rest use the defaults.
_comment3: Valid keys: short, medium, long, very_long
short: What is the capital of France?
medium: You are a helpful assistant. Explain how TCP/IP works to a junior developer. Keep your answer under 300 words.
long: You are a senior software engineer. Explain the SOLID principles with one concrete code example for each principle. Be thorough.
very_long: You are a technical writer. Write a comprehensive guide on REST API design best practices, covering: resource naming, HTTP methods, status codes, versioning, authentication, pagination, error handling, and documentation. Write at least 1500 words.
